rulings.Case Title: S.C.TANG INVESTMENTS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. SUNG CHING TANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss Or Stay The Action For Inconvenient Forum And Req. For Judicial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 29, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT SUNG TANG Motion To Dismiss Or Stay The Action For Inconvenient Forum. Motion granted, this action is stayed pending the completion of litigation in Hong Kong. Hong Kong is a suitable alternative forum. Defendant is a Hong Kong resident and is amenable to jurisdiction there. The balance of public and private interest factors makes it just for litigation to proceed in Hong Kong. Trial and enforcement of the judgment will be less expensive and more expeditious in Hong Kong given that most of the key witnesses reside there. California does not have a significant interest in this litigation. The two corporations incorporated in California are both subsidiaries of parent corporations incorporated out of the country. A related suit is pending in Hong Kong. No showing that Hong Kong would be an inconvenient forum. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY B. HOROWITZ VS. RONY M. OSORIO MR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 29, 2010, line 7, DEFENDANT ERIKA GUERRERO Motion For Determination of Good Faith Settlement. Motion granted. The settlement was entered in good faith. Plaintiff's lost wages claim appears inflated given the minor nature of the accidents. Guerrero is paying the full policy limit. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN HANCEY VS. CLUB ONE FITNESS CENTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 29, 2010, line 9, DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion granted. Defendant shifts the burden of proof by showing the release language negated defendants duty to plaintiff. No triable issue of fact raised. No showing the terms of the release are ambiguous, or that the term "facility" is unclear within the context of the release. =(302/CWW)
